title: Enhanced Flower Pots
description: This improved all flower pots in the game and the flowers that reside in them!
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6924b5dc5dd7fb239210321a9cc5f0585edda87b.png)
# What does this pack do?
  This resourcepack works on everything flower pot related, so when placing down a flower pot it has a better texture than before! Even the flowers in the pot get improved as they can even change the look of a flower pot. Quality of life improvements to basic flowers and full on reworks to stuff like cactus. This resourcepack has every pot and flower covered!

## Before and After
![Transformation](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dc6b6454da9562dc2a22848cfbfca9c9ba20fbb2.gif)
## What your room could look like
![nice room design](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb31c496930dc9d0e4f5e1fc7443cf069c60700a.png)
